product_depth.justification: All 6 sections present in each of 3 files. Methodology tables have 5+ entries. Criteria anchors are concrete and domain-specific. Anti-patterns have 6-8 entries each.

functionality.justification: Both identified gaps fixed: check IDs with criterion prefixes (8 per file) and domain-specific security guidance. All existing content preserved.

visual_design.justification: Consistent structure across all 3 files. Same section numbering, subsection ordering, table column headers. Markdown formatting correct.

code_quality.justification: No broken markdown. No orphaned cross-references. No duplicate content. All table rows parse correctly.

contract_checks.evidence: All 3 files have 6 sections with no placeholders or TBDs
All 3 files have 8 criterion-mapped check IDs (4 required + 4 advisory per file)
Structure consistent across all 3 files verified by section comparison
No broken markdown found; grep verification of section counts and check IDs all pass

internal_consistency.justification: All 3 files follow identical structure patterns. New subsections use consistent table formats and heading hierarchy.

intentionality.justification: Check IDs use domain-specific criterion prefixes. Security guidance references domain-specific artifacts. No generic boilerplate.

craft.justification: Markdown formatting consistent. Tables properly structured. Section hierarchy follows established pattern.
